description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Slot shoulders; Price 1,000 gp (+1), 4,000 gp (+2), 9,000 gp (+3), 16,000 gp (+4), 25,000 gp (+5); Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Flecks of silver or steel are often sown amid the fabric of these magical cloaks. EFFECT This garment offers magic protection in the form of a +1 to +5 resistance bonus on all saving throws ( Fortitude, Reflex, and Will ).
